dossier.bio: Mr. Benjamin Shyong — founder and CEO of OpenClaw / Injester. Returning to Sand Hill after a July investor visit; on the Bay Area leg of a Hong Kong–to–SF rotation.
conversationHooks: He's spoken publicly about OpenClaw's Series A in March — only reference if he raises it.
Last Sand Hill stay (Jul 2025): praised the Bici Coffee morning cycling provisioning; he may want it again.
handleWithCare: Dietary: vegetarian. Tree-nut allergy — hard constraint, confirm with every kitchen.
Audio preference is silence. No in-room music on arrival; minimise lobby-to-suite chatter.
Two Hong Kong stays and one Sand Hill stay — returning Rosewood guest. Greet by name, not by script.

suppressed.reason: Calendar-inferred meeting context from past stays — below standard floor; keep as 'business focus' not specifics.
Public co-investors and Stanford GSB cohort relationships should not surface unprompted.

reasoning: Voice / A2A intake confirmed roomTempC = 20 this season.
Stated preference: silence — suppress in-room music and welcome playlist.
Scent reset to neutral per intake — Sand Hill's cedar default not requested.
Bedding down-free — CRM preference + Hong Kong precedent.
Lighting kept at Sand Hill default (ambient), dimmed for late-afternoon arrival.

welcomeAmenity.name: Heirloom Bartlett pears + Bay Area honey
welcomeAmenity.story: 30 min from property — orchard fruit that grew up under the same coastal fog
welcomeAmenity.reasoning: Vegetarian and tree-nut-safe by selection (no almonds, no walnuts). Bay Area provenance gives Maria Salvo a natural opening — he's a founder; orchard-and-supply-chain stories tend to land. Sense of Place: Bay Area orchard, not generic luxury fruit.

itinerary.title: Sand Hill cycling loop with Bici provisions
itinerary.whyHere: His standing morning ritual — long walk or ride + filter coffee. Bici provisioning matches his prior request.
itinerary.vendorOrPlace: Sand Hill Road loop · Bici Coffee at property
itinerary.reasoning: He praised this exact set-up on the July visit. Quiet, self-paced, no companion required — fits his stated ritual rhythm.

itinerary.title: Vegetarian breakfast in-suite
itinerary.whyHere: His standing intake preference; no breakfast meetings before 9.
itinerary.reasoning: He's explicit about morning protected time. Pre-position vegetarian breakfast service; don't book a table.

itinerary.title: Cantor Arts Center private view, Stanford
itinerary.whyHere: Cantor's California modernism collection; quiet hours
itinerary.vendorOrPlace: Stanford Cantor Arts Center · Daniel Sotomayor (Placemaker)
itinerary.reasoning: He visited GSB recently (public). A Cantor walk with Daniel Sotomayor extends the Stanford visit into something hospitality-shaped without manufacturing a tie.

itinerary.title: Vegetarian tasting at The Sea
itinerary.whyHere: Quiet alcove available; full vegetarian tasting on advance request.
itinerary.reasoning: Vegetarian + tree-nut allergy both flag-able with this kitchen. Quiet alcove honours the silence preference. Travel day — confirm an alcohol-free pairing per intake.
